keyLearnings: Kilo skills use lazy-loading (metadata at startup, full content on-demand)
Permission model: allow/ask/deny with glob patterns, last match wins
Sensitive file protection (.env) is built-in, not configurable
summary: Deep analysis of Kilo Code documentation (ref/kilocode/packages/kilo-docs). Ingested 7 knowledge entries covering: agent patterns, skills system, permissions, workflows, custom instructions, custom rules, prompt engineering. Fixed doctor errors (.xforge/rag missing, errors-solutions-graph empty). Fixed nav encoding across 55 manual pages. Doctor now passes with 0 errors.
